ogTitle: Shannons Flat vs Shark Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shannons Flat and Shark Creek.
heading: Shannons Flat vs Shark Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shannons Flat, New South Wales and Shark Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shark Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Shannons Flat (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shannons Flat or Shark Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shannons Flat has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Shark Creek scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shannons Flat scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Shark Creek scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shannons Flat or Shark Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shark Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
